segments.text: Jai Shri Mataji, most auspicious holy mother.
Sri Mataji you who are the divine creatrix of this magnificent splendor
or creation
You Who Are The Divine Poetess whose magnificent poetry is manifest in
forms of this universe. You who bequeaths life and meaning to
This wonderful existence, O Sri Bhavani we surrender
To you...you are manifest as the unfathomable vastness
Of spiritual galaxies....You are manifest
As exquisite beauty of divine flowers of chakras
You who are manifest as the sweet fragrance of those flowers like pollen to permeate
The cosmos in the form of divine Chaitanya. Oh
Sri Vishwarupa, we surrender to you
You, who are the divine essence of the Vedas as elucidated by Sri Brihaspati.
you Who Are The Divine Melody Of The Flute Of Shri Krishna
.You ,Who Are The Divine Embodiment
Of The Paramananda
Of Sri Sadashiva
O Sri Bhagavati
We Surrender To You
Shrimataji
On this most auspicious occasion
our brothers and sisters around the world join us,
The Children of America's in humbly seeking your divine permission
to offer our salutations at Your lotus feet
by worshiping You're all-pervading form
of Sri Virata. Shri Mataji
we pray To you as one heart
and one soul, to mercifully grant us in your divine compassion our desire
to perform your puja today by accepting this humble prayer.
Bolo Sri Adi Shakti Sakshat, Sri Virata Sakshat
Shri Nirmala Devi Namohana Maha
Jai Shri Mataji!
We are going worship
Shri Krishna as Virat
First is important
To understand the incarnation of Shri Krishna
Krishna word comes from the word krishi. Krishi means agriculture, he is sown the seeds of
spirituality and for that first off all you have to think where are we as far as spirituality
concerned? How it's a land so what had happened at time of Shri Rama was He created
lots of Mariyadas, and by these Mariyadas people started mentally thinking about it.
I'm not supposed to do that –I am not suppose t o this… It was just mental binding
…it wasn't spontaneous….It's not such! As a result the people became extremely
serious they wouldn' talk much..they didn''t laugh or enjoy anything. So
we must remove them from this conditioning, and this condition has to be removed in such
a manner that they enjoy themselves.
Then he found out there were three suggestions as far achieving the goal was concerned
so first one is says it's become a realized soul – sitapragya-to go beyond all temptations
Go beyond all ego, go beyond all kinds of conditioning and to become a Sita Pragya.
Sita pragyay is where he doesn't feel like ordinary people attracted towards things
but is absolutely detached and this detached person doesn't take to any grievances, jealousies
or these things. That he told! But how do you achieve it? He never told
And the second thing that he described was
You must work, after all
You have got all the human tendencies to work, but the fruit of that work you leave it at
a lotus feet or God what we call divine power.
This is another trick because he realized how humans beings were twisted and they had
an ego if told them something then misinterpreted so took other way round tell them something
Now whatever work we do, your ego is intact and with that ego you can never give it up
at the lotus feet of divine.
It's an impossible!
So he made a possible situation so after some time people will realize this cannot
be done, and they'll give up this idea of leaving everything at the lotus feet
Of The Divine.
This was how he prepared to learn.
Second thing is that Pushpam phalam toya – flowers fruit
And water whatever you offer me I will take it but when
When you do that, when you must have Ananya Bhakti.
Ananya means completely single-minded, when there is not the other – this only possible
after Realization!
Only After Realization can put fruits of your work at Lotus Feet and only after
Self-realization, you can have Ananya Bhakti means the devotion which is singular.
These absurd conditions He put for human beings because they were so much complicated
So many people tell Me Mother we are doing ananya bhakti – how?
Because We're singing on street, taking the name of God all time and going to ponder
Pandaripur, you see in rags and for one month we walk singing, singing.
This kind of absurd ideas about bhakti he never gave but it is the way
He wanted to neutralize the absurdities
Of human beings that they thought this was the bhakti which
Is not. Ananya Bhaktis only possible when
When you are realized soul, when your connected with the Divine and there's not other.
This is how he tried to make three-way attack I should on human beings way of their stupidity
because it thought that if i tell them directly do like this ,dolikethat then they say
Of course we did it and still never achieved.
In India there's a big cult, you can call people who go to Pandharpur for one month
they walk in rags singing the songs on their way eating food at different places according
to them this is ananya bhakti and they achieve nothing. They become very sick, and very
tired ,and have a bad old age but who can tell them? They are all lost in it so
This Is A Way One Could Tackle Human Beings To Show They Are Stupid And So Many People
You'll come and ask Me, as I told you that how is it we do so much bhakti of Shri Krishna
And We have achieved nothing.
So He's the one who prepared The land for sowing – we can say he was like a
very great agriculturist!
So his name was Krishi, Krishna.
There are so many things I've told you about him how he's named as Krishna and then
He was called as Radha or who was Radha?
Who is Krishna all those thing but when
He talked of these
Things also
He told that You should become Stithaprakya
That they call as Gyan Yoga
Gyan means knowledge, so you should get Absolute Knowledge.
That he didn't say how that You know what is absolute knowledge which
we can feel it on your fingertips in Sahaja Yoga
Another thing his specialty was to create discretionary people
He thought by doing all these things
In a stupid manner they might develop a discretion
To now this not the way you can achieve anything
you have to get your self realization. Discretion was very important at this juncture when we
are facing a sort of challenge for new millennium that the whole world is going
be destroyed and all those things people are talking, it is really very important to know
through discretion what's good or bad.
One may talk of something as a very good thing but the Divine Discretion which acts
Once you are in the realm of Divine Discretion,
You cannot commit mistakes.
Even if want to do it
I'll give My example
We went
To buy a house
And that fellow was like a beggar
He came and said we have nothing
No food
They've taken away all our things
Just absolutely starving
When they say
When he said that we are starving,
We have nothing.
So I felt pity for him and
I said all right increase the price
First we increased the price
Still He was saying no-no give us more
still we increased
The price
Though reluctantly
Increased the price
Third time again
Then He said
No!
we'll have something more than that, a little bit more.
Immediately you see this discretion worked and I said these are hypocrites
–I just left them and sat in the car at right moment
That was not such good proposition or anything
but i could say they…
…i'm buying it out of my pity may call it compassion
But above the compassion was this discretion, which said nothing doing you better get out
of it.
So these divine discretion is a very-very important thing that we should see how works
and be satisfied with them – not to feel bad about missing chance or anything but
But you must feel very happy that this thing has happened and your Divine Discretion has
taken over.
So sometimes it appears, in the Divine Discretion – You may do something wrong or have done
very true when you practice Sahaja Yoga. The discretion, of Divine Discretion is extremely
important to play a great part in our lives because this Divine Discretion gives us the
real joy for being and ourselves of Sahajyoga. So that third point was
for him to make people joyous and happy, but with all these mariadas of Shri Rama he didn't
know how do it.
So –to give people joys-he said alright let us dance ,let's sing .Let' s play
holy..all sorts things…and that really originated many thing which were sort not serious
may look frivolous, but in that there was joy expressed.
All he did to give them a full idea as for Sahaja Yogi or we can say self-realized soul
what should be the attitude towards everything?
But it is not like you have do it – just works out!
It is like that, in the state of Sahaj you enjoy everything – enjoyment.
And what his idea was to create a sense of joy among people many people there are lots
critics have criticized this part according them religion means should become just old
at the age of twenty years, you should become an old man of eight-years," something like
that.
Funny ideas for religious achievement but he talked about joy and never talked of
renunciation!
He didn't talk to give up your family or children…never ever.
He said, you must enjoy.
Enjoy with detachment – for people it is very difficult to understand how can be without
detachment?
With attachment we never enjoy!
If your attached something then cannot enjoy anything in a full way like supposing
are attached to your child, very simple thing you're attached with a child. If you attach
it then will be bothered about things which should not there that would give joy for the
children either and allow them say go out or talk people whatever it is all kinds
restrictions you have put.
But if you have really the Divine Discretion, then
You will know with whom He should talk
where he could go what to enjoy and
And see that He enjoys life.
Any attachment
With anything doesn't give
The full view of
That person or thing
If your detached
Then you can see it say from above, above him.
Above the thing if your detached
You become thoughtlessly aware also
As I said now see these carpets are there
They're very beautiful carpets
Now is they here
If their mine I'll be worried
I will all time worry because I'm attached
That this carpet should not be spoiled
But if I am not attached, I look at those carpets and what do i see?
The joy that is put in by the artist who has made them.
And this joy really tries to reflect on me also!
That Joy comes into Me so have anything attachment there will be happiness but not
Because joy is single and happiness is double, happiness or unhappiness.
So even if I try to enjoy something I'll think oh still there this point it's there
but Joy all pervading
It has no boundaries
And you just get dissolved in the ocean of joy
That was what Shri Krishna idea that cut out these Mariyadas
Nowadays we see the Mariyadas of so many things are really useless, for example you have discovered
The Mariyada's of religion.
See when they live in Mariyadas then what happens?
They sort coagulate or all kinds germination inside like a pond which is absolutely bound
It is not flowing like river.
So,like that you see it becomes a kind of closed mind with these Mariyadas and when
we have this Mariyada's ,you start thinking whether I should do or no .whether I will
enjoy it o rnot ? With thes Mariyadas only you kill the joy.
Now we have other Mariyadas about say, as I should give you the religion.
Many people who love to come to Sahaja Yoga but because they are Mariyada's of silly
things in their religion ,they cannot come . They think this is our religion while
And they don't understand, falsehood becomes the Mariyadas.
and They dont' understand that what is actually made by the religion also?
You see now in Islam What's happening with these Mariyada
,they want to have another country this thing
In other Christian religions same things happen
Also in Hindu religion, all these Mariyadas are really stagnating them completely and
they're getting crushed into it.
There's no discretion because – They have said It!
The do IT!
…They' re so much blind folded about it that the cannot see what is right or
wrong but after Sahaja Yoga you can laugh at them and then we've social Mariyada
Social mariadas are there, which sometimes when abandoned can become very horrid also.
Like in the West now – women think that less dress they wear more beautiful they
have.
This is a new thing we've started!
Now this absurd… if you see description behind it's really simple
that we have been animals and now don't want to wear any clothes because
We are, we're animals. It's an animal heritage
That is why so many women do not wanna wear full dresses
it just animal behavior
So the Mariyada of good Mariyadas also people can give up saying
We don't want any Mariyadas, we are free.
You can do whatever you like."
But in that freedom what to achieve?
Your animal instinct works and your think of yourself as a very free personality!
Then there is the Mariyadaas for our country – God has not made different countries
at all nor it's true they're from other countries but variety is there.
Variety people, variety places is here.
These varieties must be accepted as something very artistic and one should not get ruined
or confused with those ideas that we are Americans, we're Indians… you know.
Now after Sahaja Yoga now can say all of us are Sahajyogis but don't belong to any
country like this.
The country may belong to you, but don't belong for the country.
I mean work is today understand that if really want care of all these countries and then
we must do some work.
Work Sahaja Yoga so people get rid off this silly ideas fighting for territory
for this, or that. All over the world there's going on – we want
This Land and We Want That Land! Land belongs to God not
human beings… And what is use of fighting
For land I don't understand? But this confusion
Is There an illusion in their and people work out
On these confusions and illusions To such an extent
They ruin Their lives, The lives Of their children
so many people are lost, so many people in the lunatic asylum I should say because they
end up with some sort of a refugee camp.
They're having good house nicely living there then you become refugees why?
Because believe that can have their own land and place and live here this idea
That comes, I think from some stupid leaders who want to have for themselves these lands
and that's how people fight for land.
There is no need of fighting or fighting your country but the situation is such unless
and until you fight, you cannot get to the truth.
And that's why if remember that Shri Krishna told Arjuna – that is your fight!
You have to fight this people because they are the
People who do not live with Dharma They're Adharmis so
have to fight. And that is how his fighting was so much justified, because after fighting
the war they got back what their deserved – They were deceived and this why Shri
Krishna said you should not by any chance become a slave of these people but you
So fighting also is justified in the Divine Discretion, it's again the Divine Discretion.
Where you have to fight?
Because You don't want be a slave!
If Your are a Slave your no good.
so for that u can fight but when people start fighting
For separation or territory its not correct
On contrary one should never think of separating
England's, it creates lots of problems.
But now we believe in the global religion – We Believe In The Global Territory!
You don't have to ask for anything anywhere you go you are a citizen or that place anybody
who goes wants to Russia ever the whole Russians will be with you and if they go
These are ideas of human beings and if the human being get transformed, there will be
no problem for any war or territory to be achieved.
This was the divine description which is instilled within us as you know that this
is a part and parcel of the Vishuddhi Chakra, where Shri Krishna resides.
But when He rises to your Sahastrara – When he rises that level then he becomes Virata
So Viratah's chakra is placed in head here about Agnya
And this Virata is the form of Shri Krishna, who has risen above the Agnya.
When you are risen about the Agnya
You become a part and parcel
Of Viratas land we can say
Because unless or until
are above your ego, you're still involved with yourself and wrong ideas of Mariyadas.
But when we rise about that then become the Virat – The Great!
Then in the land of Virata and Viratas powers are tremendous as seen by Arjuna form of
The power of Virat becomes so tremendous that it acts globally,
It acts in such a manner
That you sit here and anywhere
You can act.
You have seen this now
Many times people say
Mother its miracle
My mother was sick
And she wasn't there
I just prayed
She got alright
This is all the Power of Virat
The power of Virat is that it can penetrate into the subtle side human beings in such
a manner, everything we are connected with.
We're not separate as every drop is connected to ocean – we've been connected
with the whole universe and when you become a citizen, I should say of Virat then all
things which are connected also get your vibrations ideas ambitions everything passes
through that.
And it works, you have seen how many miracles
Have taken place in your lives.
It is the Virata Shakti that works
Now for this we need to know
How do worship of Virat
First off all
You must rise above your ego
Very important
Otherwise can you worship?
There's your ego
standing in between, and how can you rise up to the point of Virat?
You have pass through that.
Once your above ego
enter into kingdom of Virat
There king is a Virat
And are subject
who looked after completely by Virata Shakti
By power of Virat
But at that stage you become really a universal personality in way, because whatever are problems
university.
Now not necessarily they should be attached to You or connected with You – supposing
the person is of this level now there may have been war some other country it can
stop somebody who has been oppressed and win over anywhere your compassion moves
works out. Whenever your attention will go, it'll work out and sometimes you are surprised
as to how this thing's worked out? How coincidences have taken place?" The only
things is that we've crossed the state of our ego into the state of Virat which
is a very important thing to do, it's to enter into the area of Virat.
Then you don't think this your country – This belongs to You that belongs
To Your.
This belonging business finishes off!
then you belong to Virat and he uses you for his own purpose in
sense that when your whole thinking is different, becomes global
Thinking then He acts and
Then His powers are many fold. At Krishna's power
Is he uses a conch to call people
I have given conches all the leaders so we
Have now announce and called
But at the level of Virat, you don't have to do all that.
At a level of virat it just people see and they'll know
Just...they will watch You
And They Will Know
Just..They Think You Are Human Beings
and you are so sweet,so good just like gems shining all the time.
So they'll be impressed!
This comes through Virata's blessing
when You become that then
forget about other things
Like your big positions or anything
come from a very rich family
All these nonsensical things
which actually not true
And all these things on which you want to exist are no more.
People like show off their wealth, some people like be very sort of demonstrative what they
think that there is but in the case a person who rises about his ego and he's part
parsam of that Virata Shakti enters into the kingdom of Virat, he knows He's very small.
His is a little smaller compared to that and He just dissolves in to that shakti
And this should happen with us we should humble down We should Humble Down
I know that our powers, whatever we have if they give us ego
We should get rid of it.
You shouldn't not to have the ego
you should actually achieve that state
where can be called as citizens
after Virata's power
May God bless y'all
All country leaders please come to the stage
to wash His Mother's feet?
Like children. You are a child then,
as children you enter
As Christ has said
when we enter into the Kingdom of God
We have be like children
and that is what today all
us should do
Innocent-like children
We need to be innocent

brain. The Viratangana power in her form as Sri Radha sustains the energy and

The light of a thousand suns You give.

you are reflection on macrocosm our holy mother graces this wonder

all music reflects Your song of songs. Divine Power

you give the integration between brain and heart that makes it

please bless us to know that we our tranquil reflections

so,we're able become Sakshi Swarupatva
a witness do play

able see problems from inside

let divine vibration cleanse

Your power Ovirata ends all contradictions
in upside down brain of peoples

The miracle photos from Sri Visnumaya power reveal deities who gather and give splendor
to the sovereignty of Sri Krishna.
The power of Virat with the Vishnumaya Shakti helps us see through materialism and its false attractions.
The Viratangana Power enhances our brain's capacity to be compassionate
and creative, preserve from unholiness TV, film
and internet, which promote violence
And lust. Sri Krishna you weld together
the social political
an economic aspects of society
into Sahaj culture
You end all corruption
U contain Hiranyagarbha
The embryo of creation

Of the Virat bring
the beauty of true Sahaja art, music and song to
world. Make us all Arjuna's brave enough
To fight problems in American society that encourage
violence among teenagers you control The five senses
And release from delusion those seeking
to know the greatness of yoga, release
The young people from delusion.
You are a vehicle for understanding dharma
and preserving society help America's
influential personalities to awaken
To Yoga.
